body:
| Friend,

Growing crowds. Hundreds of new Caucus Captains. And then grudging acknowledgement from the press that Rick Santorum is building momentum in Iowa. 2012? No... 2016! It’s déjà vu all over again! Last night at the GOP debate, Rick Santorum was on fire calling out the mainstream media for their bias, holding Barack Obama accountable for his eight failed years in the White House, and laying out a positive conservative vision for hardworking American families. Now, today in the _Des Moines Register_ , columnist Quin Hillyer put it best: **“Santorum is the man who actually plays the music — without great fanfare, but with all the right high notes.”** Rick Santorum has hit his stride in the final days before the Iowa Caucus. But he needs the help of loyal supporters like you. Friend,can Rick count on you? Your generous donation today of $$25 will go a long way to making sure our Caucus Captains have the materials they need on Caucus Night, making sure the campaign has all our bases covered, and that he is ready to take the next steps the morning after Iowa. **[Friend, please give $25 to help our Iowa team cover a captain packet.](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorumiowa%3Fsc%3Dall_over&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=all_over&n=1)

National Communications Director

subject: An alligator in a tutu
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
This election is seriously tight. | Friend --

I read the other day that more of Bernie's supporters have donated to support his campaign than Hillary's.

I don't mean to be cranky, but what in the hell is that all about?! We've got the best chance we've ever had to put a woman in the White House, and oh, by the way, she just happens to be the most qualified candidate maybe since General George Washington himself!!

**[Chip in $1 and let's catch up to Bernie's donors right now.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ1OTg1MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzI0Mjk3OTQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)** This is crunch time now: This election is tighter than an alligator wearing a tutu.

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Ted Cruz is targeting me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46008896:J24PGIrWN:m:1:1349778030:A88A9CA830E547B133C37D003E8CA1B0:r)
---
| | | | Peter, did you see the news yesterday? Ted Cruz and his allies are training all their attention on me in Iowa -- after Thursday's debate, they know our campaign has momentum, and cheap, dishonest attacks are the only way they know to take me on. [**I need your immediate support to fight back.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46008896:J24PGIrWN:m:1:1349778030:A88A9CA830E547B133C37D003E8CA1B0:r) They're joining up with the tens of millions in attacks we've already seen from the Republican Establishment. We MUST be able to fight back. But I can't without your help. [**Will you please donate $5 or more right now to ensure I can fight back and answer Ted Cruz's attacks?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46008896:J24PGIrWN:m:1:1349778030:A88A9CA830E547B133C37D003E8CA1B0:r) Peter, our enemies should fear the United States and all of our power, but right now none of them do. President Obama has done an abysmal job leading our nation. I am the only candidate who has a strong, consistent record on the most important job a President has, national security. [**Answering Cruz 's attacks on our campaign is critical. Will you help me fight back right now with a donation of $5 or more?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46008896:J24PGIrWN:m:1:1349778030:A88A9CA830E547B133C37D003E8CA1B0:r) **Ted Cruz 's campaign and his super PAC can say whatever they want about me and my campaign, but the truth is this: I am the only candidate for President who has the conservative vision to win the nomination AND beat Hillary Clinton.** Their attacks are ridiculous at best, but **Peter, we must respond right away to show we aren't going to allow the Cruz campaign to tear down my campaign.** While Ted Cruz's campaign is busy trying to defeat me, I am on the campaign trail talking with Americans about how we can undo the wrongs Barack Obama has done to our nation. I will never waver from my goal to connect with every American and take our nation back, but I can't accomplish that unless I have your support. Now is the time to unite our party, rather than spew outrageous attacks. Real leadership means coming up with commonsense solutions -- not mudslinging. [**If you stand with me, I need to know RIGHT NOW. Please follow this link to share your support today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46008896:J24PGIrWN:m:1:1349778030:A88A9CA830E547B133C37D003E8CA1B0:r) Thanks for your commitment to our nation. Marco P.S. Only two days remain until voting begins in Iowa, and every action we take between now and then will have an impact on what happens. I am asking you today to stand with me against these outlandish attacks and fight for a better future. Together we can win the Republican nomination and defeat Hillary Clinton. [**But I can only be successful if I have your support right now. Please chip in whatever you can afford -- this is crunch time and your donation no matter the size will make a large impact.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46008896:J24PGIrWN:m:1:1349778030:A88A9CA830E547B133C37D003E8CA1B0:r)

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Cup of Joe: January 30, 2016
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Joe Sestak
body:
www.JoeSestak.com
CUP OF JOE

January 30, 2016
Weekly Newsletter

Good morning! I wanted to provide an update about what I've been up to this past week. Thanks so much for reading. I appreciate your support.
Starting Off by Shoveling Out

Like many of you, I started the week off by shoveling out -- 22 inches of snow in Philadelphia! Thank you to the emergency responders who kept Pennsylvania safe during the blizzard, which ranked as the fourth largest in Philadelphia history. I snapped this selfie while shoveling out so I could make it to Centre County the next morning!

Traveling the State to Say Hello

We're less than 100 days away from the primary election, so I've been traveling even more than usual to meet with regular Pennsylvanians all across the Commonwealth.

This week, I visited places like King of Prussia, West Chester, Mountville, Plymouth Meeting, Abington, West Point, Fort Washington, Hollidaysburg, Brookville, Philadelphia, and Clearfield. Here's my photo album from this week:

Talking on TV about Why I'm Running

I went on FOX 43 in Harrisburg to discuss why I'm running to represent you in the U.S. Senate: to bring an unmatched level of constituent service to the people, to fix the trust deficit in our political system, to make higher education more affordable, and to continue expanding access to quality health care. Listen to the full segment by clicking the video below:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mK8pTJUsIhA

Constituent Service Stories: Access to Adult Autism Programs

In Congress, my district office serviced almost four times the constituent cases as the average office -- almost 18,000 over four years. When I am your Senator, I want to continue to bring that high level of service to the people of Pennsylvania. This week, one of my former constituents, Kathleen, shared her story of how we served her and her son Michael. Kathleen contacted my district office when she was facing the unfortunate decision to quit her job because the funding that allowed her son to attend his adult autism day program was running out. We helped Michael to stay in his program and continue making his fullest contribution to society. Click the play button below to watch Kathleen's story:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uvQHhKObGHo

An Open Op-Ed: No Better Time than Yesterday for a Moratorium on Fracking

During my 31 years in the U.S. Navy, I saw firsthand some of the most environmentally sensitive places on the planet and the consequences of environmental and conservation failures. And as a Pennsylvanian born and raised, I well-know the lessons of the demise of the anthracite coal industry, where the Commonwealth was left with a $15 billion cleanup of 2,500 miles of damaged streams and 250,000 acres of contaminated land because of the lack of adequate regulation and the absence of proper oversight.

That's why when I returned to Pennsylvania and was elected to serve as a Congressman, I fought to try and ensure that my fellow Pennsylvanians would not have to sacrifice their clean water, clean air, natural lands, and local roads and infrastructure in the hasty pursuit of Marcellus shale gas. I called for a moratorium on Marcellus shale fracking because I was not convinced we had strong enough environmental, health, and property safeguards, and I was not satisfied that people would have the access to just compensation should even the best safeguards fail.

As I said last week to the statewide press corps at the Pennsylvania Press Club in Harrisburg, my position remains the same today because it was based on the facts then - almost all of which remain true now.

YOU CAN READ MY ENTIRE OP-ED BY CLICKING HERE:

http://joesestak.com/open-op-ed-no-better-time-than-yesterday-for-a-moratorium-on-fracking/

Thanks for reading -- and please click the "contribute" button to keep our momentum going.

- JOE

CONTRIBUTEFacebook: www.facebook.com/joesestak
Twitter: twitter.com/JoeSestak
www.joesestak.com

Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

body:
**Friend -- **Did you see Senator Graham's email? He's right, we're down to the wire. **With only 32 hours left, we 're still $19,428 short of our goal of $250,000. **

This is serious, if we don't hit this goal by tomorrow at midnight, we might not have the resources we need on Monday.

[**Make sure that doesn 't happen. Contribute just $1 right now and help us beat this goal. **](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/hsqrjsfpmwczndnvzsgrmzldffzlpdjprshscpdsbnhc_jmqvvfns.html)

Onward,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/drtkzrjwsmcfgbgtfrnksflbjjflwbzwkrdrcwbrhgdm_jmqvvfns.html)
**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Lindsey Graham
Date: January 30, 2015
Subject: Just 48 hours**

**Friend -- we're just 48 hours away from the Iowa Caucuses. That means there are only 48 hours to help Jeb raise the $250,000 needed to win.**

This is crunch time. Every hour that passes without your help for Jeb is an hour we can't and won't get back.

[**That 's why I'm concerned. We're still $24,942 short. So, Friend, would you please consider rushing a contribution of just $1 right now?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/jtshctnkfmvwspsbwtdhfwzpnnwzkpckhtqtvkptjsqq_jmqvvfns.html)

Friend, I know that Jeb will wipe the floor with Hillary Clinton, the most flawed candidate to come out of the Democratic Party in decades.

**But unless you step up now and help us hit this goal, Jeb won 't have the resources he needs to turn out votes in the final 48 hours. [Please chip in just $1 in the next 48 hours.](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/thpfsbprjcvkwtwlkbgfjkdtppkdrtsrfbmbvrtbhwmj_jmqvvfns.html)**

There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines any longer. That's why I need you to join me in doing everything we can to help Jeb win. **That starts right now with a contribution of just $1:**

[**Jeb2016.com/Stand-With-Jeb/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/jjfhctnkfmvwspsbwtdhfwzpnnwzkpckhtqtvkptjsqn_jmqvvfns.html)

Thank you,

Lindsey Graham
U.S. Senator, South Carolina

| **In recent weeks and months, so much has changed in this race.** But as of right now, we have every reason to be optimistic about what will happen when the American people start voting in 2 days. According to Google's official post-debate poll, **62% of Americans say I won** last night by a landslide. **As a result, we're _already seeing a noticeable surge_ in momentum here on the ground in early-voting states like Iowa.** Peaking in the days immediately before Americans start casting their votes is _exactly_ what we need to do--and it's exactly how we're going to shock the political class when the first tallies come out on Monday evening. **But in any presidential primary, anything can happen --and fast.** Even in the days and hours before the vote. If we're going to sustain this burst of momentum through Monday, we need to push back as hard as we possibly can this weekend--and make sure we cross the finish line at full speed. Please don't let this campaign down when I need you most. [**Will you stand strong with me and this campaign? Please invest $13 right away. name: Katherine Van Hollen
subject: we can do it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Dear Friend,

Every day more and more Marylanders are jumping onboard this campaign to deliver results for working people. They are going door-to-door, making phone calls, and volunteering their time to help get the word out about what kind of a Senator Chris will be for all of us.

But while we are working to mobilize Marylanders, Chris's opponent is counting on the backing of an outside SuperPAC to get elected. That SuperPAC has already spent $1 million in a Baltimore area media blitz to try to hijack this election.

If you agree that _Citizens United_ was one of the worst Supreme Court decisions ever, **[then please help us send a strong message that Marylanders will decide their own elections.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ce4/70cdc2ba/47c63743/3965bf3/1149664482/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-jan-eom?refcode=em013016_1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+then+please+help+us+send+a+strong+messag&utm_campaign=em13016&source=em13016")**

Sunday is our first fundraising deadline of the 2016 election year. We are depending on people like you to help Chris get his message out and show that the power of the people can overcome an outside SuperPAC!

**[Click here and contribute before the January deadline!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ce4/70cdc2ba/47c63743/3965bf0/1149664482/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-jan-eom?refcode=em013016_1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+and+contribute+before+the+Jan&utm_campaign=em13016&source=em13016")**

Thank you for having Chris's back,

Katherine
---
